message:
fix(bv): remove truncation from triage markdown output

The compact markdown format was truncating titles and reasons
which destroyed valuable context. Token savings should come from
showing fewer items, not truncating text content.

- Updated CompactMarkdownOptions() docs
- Removed truncate() calls from top picks and recommendations
- Preserved full titles and reasons in output

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
